queryDescription.title: Query Description
queryDescription.description: The description of the user’s query that indicates the intent of the user to identify a Service Catalog Item.

topicName.title: Topic Name
topicName.description: API name of the triggering topic

channelType.title: Channel Type
channelType.description: The channel type from which the action is being invoked. Always pass $Context.ChannelType as value.

messagingChannelId.title: Messaging Channel Id
messagingChannelId.description: The messaging channel Id from which the action is being invoked. Always pass $Context.MessagingChannelId as value.
